# Demo seed accounts

Credentials for the synthetic roster created when `SEED_DEMO_DATA=true` (see `backend/src/seed/demoDataset.ts`). **Every account below uses the same password configured in `DEMO_STUDENT_PASSWORD`.**

**Security:** Demo-only. Do not publish real passwords here; configure `DEMO_STUDENT_PASSWORD` in the deployment environment instead.
